name: @orbit/sync-core
description: Orbit 同步规划与 checkpoint 协调

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @orbit/api-types build && pnpm --filter @orbit/data-protocol build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @orbit/api-types build && pnpm --filter @orbit/data-protocol build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
